mutations.name: addApplicationAssets
mutations.description: Link additional assets to an Application

mutations.name: cancelPentestExecution
mutations.description: Cancel a running AI Pentest execution

mutations.name: changeIssueStatus
mutations.description: Update the status of an issue

mutations.name: createApplication
mutations.description: Create an Application grouping assets for combined risk view

mutations.name: createPentestExecution
mutations.description: Trigger a new AI Pentest execution for an artifact

mutations.name: createPentestRetest
mutations.description: Trigger an in-place retest of a finished AI Pentest project

mutations.name: createProjectRequirement
mutations.description: Create a requirement in a project (with optional nested activities)

mutations.name: createThreatModelArtifactVersion
mutations.description: Create a threat model artifact version

mutations.name: markIssueAsAnalyzed
mutations.description: Mark an issue as analyzed by the AI agent

mutations.name: removeApplicationAssets
mutations.description: Remove specific assets from an Application

mutations.name: startConvisoDast
mutations.description: Start a DAST scan now on Conviso DAST.

mutations.name: submitPentestRetestResult
mutations.description: Agent reports a per-vulnerability retest verdict

mutations.name: updateProjectRequirement
mutations.description: Update a project requirement (with optional nested activities management)

mutations.name: updateProjectStatus
mutations.description: Update the status of a project

AddApplicationAssetsInput.name: clientMutationId
AddApplicationAssetsInput.description: A unique identifier for the client performing the mutation.

CreateProjectInput.description: Optional number of students involved in the project.

CreateProjectInput.description: The ID representing the type of the project.

CreateProjectInput.description: List of portal user emails that have access to the project.

CreateProjectInput.name: assetsIds

CreateProjectInput.description: List of attachments for the project.

CreateProjectInput.name: projectScopeUrls

CreateProjectInput.name: tags

CreateProjectInput.name: teamsIds
CreateProjectInput.description: List of team IDs associated with the project.

CreateProjectInput.name: secretIds
CreateProjectInput.description: List of secrets associated with the project.
